name: Mysore One Day City Tour Private Vehicle  Four  Person Max  by Sedan

itinerary.title: Day 1 One Day Mysore City Tour
itinerary.desc:
Full-day Mysore Local Sightseeing Tour
	Duration: 9 to 11 hours
	Tour by Private Cab (not shared with others)
	Pickup & Drop: Mysore Hotel / Home
	Places Covered: Chamundeshwari Temple, Mysore Wax Museum, Mysore Maharaja Palace, St. Philomena Church, Mysore Zoological Park, Sri Ranganathaswamy Templ

itinerary.title: Day 1 Mysore
Day 2 Coorg
Day 3 Mysore
itinerary.desc:
Pay a visit to Bhagamandala, Talacauvery.
Depart for Mysore in the afternoon.
Visit Mysore Palace illuminations.
Later, drop off at Mysore Bus Station/Railway Station.

itinerary.title: Day 1 Mysore
itinerary.desc:
Departure at 8:00 a.m.
	Visit Chamundi Hill, Nandi, Mysore Palace, and Mysore Zoo.
	Later, visit St. Philomena’s Church and Jaganmohan Palace.
	At dusk, visit Brindavan Gardens at Srirangapatna.
	"Mysore Late-Night Stay.

itinerary.title: Day 2 Ooty
itinerary.desc:
Check out and depart for Ooty.
	Breakfast at Gundalpet around 8:30 a.m. [A half-hour].
	Journey through the forests of Bandipur and Madhumalai.
	tea break at Naduvattam around 11.30 am.
	Upon arrival in Ooty at 1:00 pm, visit Ooty Lake (boating).
	Lunch is around 2:30 p.m. [45 minutes].
	Later, visi

itinerary.title: Day 3 Ooty
itinerary.desc:
Pick up at 9:30 a.m.
	Proceed to Coonoor. Visit the tea estate.
	Visit Doddabetta after returning to Ooty.
	depart to Mysore.
